# Original Description
Just curious why there are so many failures of de serializing extra fields in tx?

All originate from `bool r = ::do_serialize(ar, field);` in [parse_tx_extra](https://github.com/monero-project/bitmonero/blob/master/src/cryptonote_core/cryptonote_format_utils.cpp#L293) function.

Whats interesting is that it started recently. the first such transaction is 550e9d2e1cc8d1940d0215e1fec33b4970b2f19520fe0c5bda26e9d4a4dc029d from 2016-04-25

Whats also is interesting that  all tx with this error have mixin 2. 

Some example extra data that fails (all from the example output below)
- 0146311eeb257e7820b2e0edac8b99b1dfc1cf23859a896f5804dd037dfde0bc90de20d2b3603a05bf51224fa32e52721bafd12f386cc0baf88e0db818554ee4f777cb0221009e972181f6a9abf16cf26e35d27894423ea5027f9293d944546c3a20c985ed81
- 01ed79771c93dc413903c81fa0dd641ba18d1580e8eb04eb5fa073f1de010f2977de207ca6d805bd3936b5c0da072468b357fccbe97d4d0568feb179b3509da980297c022100124137976f798367b2ef165693b9baab00a802eda7d9f522e4448bf0468e06f4
- 01ed79771c93dc413903c81fa0dd641ba18d1580e8eb04eb5fa073f1de010f2977de207ca6d805bd3936b5c0da072468b357fccbe97d4d0568feb179b3509da980297c022100124137976f798367b2ef165693b9baab00a802eda7d9f522e4448bf0468e06f4

# Discussion History
## moneromooo-monero | 2016-05-01T19:18:37+00:00
I'm guessing someone hacked the tx_extra code, or is using an entirely new tx_extra generator. These have a pubkey field, but either garbage after it, or too much data in it, so the rest of the parsing gets out of sync.


## dEBRUYNE-1 | 2016-05-01T21:49:59+00:00
Clarity regarding the wording of "hack":

> @moneromooo-monero Oh, right, I use hack in the original sense, like I hack on monero.


## iamsmooth | 2016-05-18T05:18:55+00:00
Fixed by d6bce4be36c5636e1fd4dcf208e469c29d191726 of #831 I think?


## moneromooo-monero | 2016-06-10T09:46:40+00:00
Just silenced by that, but fixed by blashyrkh's patch in https://github.com/monero-project/bitmonero/pull/856


## fluffypony | 2016-07-07T20:01:37+00:00
Fixed
